fields.reportFindings: -- 2 of 24 -- A small amount of water loss is present in the deep end skimmer throat at missing grout locations Although no water loss is present, several towels are missing in the shallow end skimmer throat At normal operation level of the spa water line, several areas are missing grout. A small amount of water loss is occurring in these areas Come and dye testing along with pressure testing and acoustical location devices, water loss is occurring in primary spa circulation line. The damaged area is estimated to be below the valving at the filtration equipment as indicated in the marked up photo The swimming pool main drain nearest the spa is missing pool finish material within the main drain sump area. Water loss is occurring at this area actively. All other main drains in the swimming pool are also missing the same coating. However, there is no water loss present currently at those three locations A small crack is present in the shallow end to the left of the steps near the autofill line. No water is actively being lost at this location All other swimming pool and spa basin structure, plumbing and filtration systems systems were in proper working condition at the time of this in...
